title: linaria intricata
intro: Linaria intricata, also known as the Dalmatian or Butterfly Toadflax, is a flowering plant species belonging to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and antitussive properties, helping to relieve coughs and congestion. The health benefits of Linaria intricata include soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Linaria intricata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
